outputs.description: Fully-qualified endpoint hostname Endpoint.ID Endpoint ID
outputs.name: Endpoint.Hostname

outputs.description: IP address of the endpoint Endpoint.MACAddress MAC address of the endpoint
outputs.name: Endpoint.IPAddress

outputs.description: The operating system used by the endpoint Endpoint.OSVersion The complete operating system version identifier used by the endpoint
outputs.name: Endpoint.OS

outputs.description: Physical memory of the endpoint in bytes Endpoint.IsIsolated Whether or not the endpoint is currently network isolated
outputs.name: Endpoint.Memory

outputs.description: Whether or not the endpoint is decommissioned
outputs.name: Endpoint.IsDecommissioned
